name: EPIDERMAL INCLUSION CYST
definition: most common benign cutaneous / subcutaneous lesion

demographics.Histo: wall lined by stratified squamous epithelium

dominant_finding: heterogeneous content ← variable amounts of internal keratinous debris and granulation
distribution: ill-defined margins + peripheral vascularity if inflamed
discriminating_features: heterogeneous content ← variable amounts of internal keratinous debris and granulation

US: heterogeneous content ← variable amounts of internal keratinous debris and granulation
± internal whorled / onion-ring appearance (= lamellated keratinous material)
ill-defined margins + peripheral vascularity if inflamed
